name: Accordion

variants.name: base
variants.description: Default spacing and type scale. Use for most pages.

variants.name: compact
variants.description: Tighter spacing and smaller type. Use for dense layouts: side sheets, modals.

wrapped_in_container.note: Use only when accordion is stand-alone on a page, not inside side sheet, modal, etc.

usage_rules.detail: Do not place an accordion inside another accordion. Use separate accordions side by side instead.
Use wrapped_in_container=true only when the accordion stands alone on a page. When inside a side sheet, modal, or other container, do not wrap in container.

usage_rules.rule: Use compact size for dense layouts
usage_rules.detail: Use compact variant inside side sheets and modal dialogs. Do not use base size in dense contexts.

usage_rules.rule: Do not confuse size with responsive Small mode
usage_rules.detail: The size variants (base/compact) are not the same as responsive Small mode. Small mode is only for responsive layout S.
Each accordion item supports up to two optional actions.
Accordion headline and subline text must use sentence case.

confidence_blockers: If ticket nests an accordion inside another accordion, flag as usage_rule violation.
If ticket uses base size inside a modal or side sheet, suggest compact instead.
If ticket places accordion inside a wrapping container while already inside a modal/side sheet, flag.

embedding_text: Accordion component. Expandable collapsible sections for grouping related content. Sizes: base default, compact for modals side sheets dense layouts. Never nest accordions. Container wrapping only when stand-alone on page. Up to two actions per item. Chevron indicates expanded collapsed state. Skeleton loading state.
